# STAGE_REPORT_TEMPLATE

> Used by `@documentation-governance` when updating `IMPLEMENTATION_STATE.md` after a
> `@stage-validator` DONE verdict.

## Stage Completed

- Stage name and number

## Definition of Done Verdict

- Verbatim verdict from `@stage-validator`

## Completed Work

- <summary>

## Files Changed

- <path> — <purpose>

## Remaining Work

- <item, if any — otherwise "None">

## Risks Carried Forward

- <item, if any — otherwise "None">

## Next Recommended Stage

- <stage name and number>

## IMPLEMENTATION_STATE.md Fields Updated

- Current Stage: <old> → <new>
- Status: <old> → <new>
- Completed Tasks: <appended entry>
- Last Verification: <date>
